ocr_snippet: NURSE’S REPORT  NURSES signed by senior Nurse. Name of the Patient: 25 to 4y UMR No: All documentation should be with time, Special care to be counter signed by ward. Reassessment done. Child drowsy, Burden some, vital signs checked and recorded. Child is conscious and settled Pain -Closse A scales-0. Burden some. No chart close — an drugalert Handed over to Nursery’s
